$comment: Story playbook — the per-story sequence of BMAD actions executed by the 'Develop Epic' n8n loop. This file is the source of truth; the n8n workflow only interprets it. scripts/pipeline/apply-amendments.mjs may update the prompt of any step, 'core' or 'learned', but may only retire (disable) steps with origin 'learned' — retiring a 'core' step stays human-only. Adjacent steps sharing a 'stage' value are order-independent (carried over from the gen-1 workflow's fan-out groups); execution is still strictly sequential in array order — the stage field only preserves which steps could run in parallel if that is ever built.

steps.label: Create story
steps.prompt: run Creation mode. Apply _bmad-output/decision-policy.md for decisions: decide + record if covered, HALT if not.

steps.label: Validate story (1st pass)
steps.prompt: run Validate mode. Apply _bmad-output/decision-policy.md for decisions: decide + record if covered, HALT if not.

steps.label: Prepare tests
steps.prompt: run Create mode. Before deferring E2E coverage, verify no browser-level mock pattern can simulate the scenario — only defer if no mock covers the ACs, and record the check in the ATDD checklist.

steps.label: Validate story (2nd pass)
steps.prompt: run Validate mode. Apply _bmad-output/decision-policy.md for decisions: decide + record if covered, HALT if not.

steps.label: Implement story
steps.prompt: develop story autonomously. As each task makes a skipped test pass, remove its skip marker — the story is not complete while skipped tests remain for done tasks. Apply _bmad-output/decision-policy.md for decisions: decide + record if covered, HALT if not.

steps.label: Unit tests
steps.prompt: run Validate mode; if coverage is insufficient, switch to Create/Resume to generate missing tests only (don't modify existing tests you didn't generate this run). Treat skipped tests as coverage failures: un-skip and run each; if it passes keep it, if it fails heal test-quality issues (selector, timing, mocking, data), if unfixable mark expected-to-fail with a comment and record in the story file. Don't edit production code. Apply _bmad-output/decision-policy.md for decisions: decide + record if covered, HALT if not.

steps.label: Code review
steps.prompt: Review the story implementation. Spec file: {implementation_artifacts}/`<epic>-<story>-*.md` (Tier 1); diff baseline = its frontmatter `baseline_commit`, or all uncommitted changes if absent. Chunk automatically if over threshold (take first chunk, note rest for follow-up). Skip the pre-review checkpoint. For decision-needed findings, apply _bmad-output/decision-policy.md: decide + record if covered (if deferring, write a one-line reason); HALT if not. After triage, choose 'apply every patch' and end — no next-steps menu.

steps.label: Test review
steps.prompt: run Validate mode. Flag skipped story-related tests for un-skipping or removal (with reason). Fix stale transitional markers directly: comments/headers claiming tests are skipped/disabled/red-phase when they're actually active must be updated to reflect current state.

steps.label: NFR review
steps.prompt: run Create mode. Find NFR-specific issues only (e.g., missing select projections, take limits, timing tests, security headers). Document findings (severity + remediation) in the story's review section.

steps.label: Update project context
steps.prompt: Review the story artifacts and implemented code. If new, repeatable, unobvious patterns or conventions emerged that aren't in project-context.md, append them (lean entries). If none, do nothing.
